name: Sam  Altman
✍️ Noteables:
Openly gay; came out publicly at age 17, advocated for “Safe Space” support in school

Known prepper: collects survival gear, owns a retreat in Big Sur, holds guns and gold and preparedness supplies

Married Oliver Mulherin in January 2024; became a father in February 2025, describing being “neurochemically hacked” by the experience

Charitably committed via Giving Pledge since mid‑2024. Investor in Reddit, Airbnb, Helion Energy, Hydrazine Capital, among many others (portfolio of ~400 companies, net worth ~$1.7–1.8B as of early 2025)

Advocates for cautious but ambitious AI development, universal basic income (“basic compute”), and regenerative policies like land value tax. Engaged in political fundraising across lines, self-describes as “politically homeless” as of July 2025

name: Sarah Friar
Job Description: Leading the finance team to ensure continued investment in core research capabilities and enabling scaling operations to meet global demand and strategic growth needs
✍️ Noteables: Co-founder of Ladies Who Launch; board member at Walmart and Consensys; Co-Chair of Stanford's Digital Economy Lab; recipient of OBE in 2019; Northern Irish origin; based in Marin County, CA.

name: Paige Hendrix Buckner
Job Description: Leads All Raise, a nonprofit organization committed to advancing women and non-binary individuals in venture capital; previously served as interim CEO and Chief of Staff; helped scale programs like VC Cohorts, VC Champions, Black & Latinx Media Mastery, and the Miami Chapter
✍️ Noteables:
Intro via Susan Lyne to explore Gwyneth Paltrow speaking at All Raise VC Summit (Moj representing on Gwyneth’s behalf).

Moj offered to send Kinship Ventures deck + data room (includes their origin story + investment focus).

Moj is a long-time supporter of All Raise, close to Jess Lee from the founding days.

Requested more info: past speakers, event programming, and a potential attendee list to help prepare.

Moj prefers streamlined comms — one thread w/ Paige, Gwyneth, and team.

Paige + Elise (SVP Marketing at All Raise) offered a 15-min prep call to support Gwyneth participation ask.

Event audience: 300+ senior women & nonbinary VCs, select LPs, allies — high-trust, off-the-record vibe.

Notable speakers: Dr. Jill Biden, execs from Anthropic, Spark Capital, Sequoia, Greylock, etc.

name: Deon Nicholas
Job Description: Deon Nicholas co‑founded Forethought, an "agentic AI platform for customer experience." He has led product and infrastructure development at Facebook, Palantir, Dropbox, and Pure Storage. He holds machine learning publications and infrastructure patents, and was a global programming contest finalist and Forbes 30 Under 30 honoree
✍️ Noteables:
Former CEO, now Board Chairman at Forethought.

Building a new AI productivity assistant; early prototype ready, fundraising pre-seed round soon.

Strong existing relationship with Moj and Kinship from past Forethought work; interested in Kinship as early investors and early users.

Intro call set for Sept 8; Moj may demo Trolley AI and get Deon’s feedback.

Project is confidential; no public announcements yet.

name: Gurdeep Prewal
Job Description: Co‑leads mission-driven venture fund focused on wellness, health, CPG brands; former investment banker at J.P. Morgan and BNP Paribas with 17 years experience.
✍️ Noteables: Transitioned from IB to wellness VC, mission-driven investing, international background (Canada, Asia, USA, Singapore), strong education mix in business/finance/nutrition.

name: Jeremy Johnson
Job Description: Oversees strategic, operational, and business development leadership for emerging brands under the Toy Box Brands umbrella. Works alongside Jerrod Blandino to launch and scale consumer‑centric beauty lines such as Polite Society and Diamond Drunk, applying trend spotting, brand incubation, and disruptive marketing approaches
✍️ Noteables:
Co-founded Too Faced Cosmetics in 1998; sold to Estée Lauder in 2016 for ~$1.45 billion

Launched incubator Toy Box Brands in 2023, debuting brands Polite Society and Diamond Drunk with clean-science principles

Known for blending bold, viral beauty innovation with clean, eco-friendly formulas and packaging

name: Jerrod Blandino
Job Description: Responsible for creative vision, product innovation, and branding across Polite Society—a clean, vegan, cruelty‑free cosmetics line with a bold, high‑performance aesthetic. Previously co-founded Too Faced Cosmetics.
✍️ Noteables:
Co-founded Too Faced in 1998; sold to Estée Lauder in 2016 for ~$1.45 billion

Launched Polite Society in August 2023 with partner Jeremy Johnson, focusing on clean‑science makeup and eco‑friendly packaging

Known for creative product packaging like the TikTok‑viral “egg” foundation and the B.I.G. Mouth lip plumper

Brand presence expanded quickly into Ulta Beauty stores and via digital launches

name: Brit Morin
text_content:
Brit emailed Moj about a new investment company (below)
She mentions Jeni Britton Bauer is also getting involved (which makes so much sense). 
Moj requests a call to review and potentially met up when she visits Kristen  
Call scheduled for wednsday 10/1
Link to Front convo
 
Email from Brit:
On Mon, Sep 22, 2025 at 9:39 AM, Brit Morin <brit@offline.vc> wrote:
Hi ladies, 

Offline is leading a new investment in a company that I think would be right up your alley. There is oversubscribed demand for the remainder of the round, but I've gotten the founders to hold off while I ping some of my favorite people (you!). 

What: Better-for-you flavored syrups / sugar, powered by allulose + fiber 
Why: Sleepy market (think: those giant bottles of Torani at coffee shops) + Gen Z is *obsessed* with flavored add-ons 
Who: Hilary Coles (HIMS co-founder — took it public, she is one of the most recent success stories of female-led IPOs, ran supply chain) and Emily Boschwitz (HIMS, Cameo, Vanta — growth marketing MONSTER)
Price: $25M post ($1M remaining)

Here's the deck (pw: pocagirls). Lmk if you want an intro to learn more!

PS: GP — I'm in Italy, heading to Amalfi tomorrow through Saturday. Send any recs! ;) 

Brit

name: Gwyneth Paltrow
text_content:
Overview
Gwyneth Paltrow is the founder of Goop, a lifestyle brand that started as a weekly newsletter and has grown into a company offering beauty products, clothing, and wellness advice. Goop has its own e-commerce platform, pop-up shops, and even a wellness summit.

Gwyneth supports various charitable organizations and causes, including the Robin Hood Foundation, which fights poverty in New York City, and Stand Up To Cancer, an initiative that raises funds for cancer research. Her commitment to giving back to the community is evident through her active participation in these charities and many fundraising events.
Notes
Feb 22
Meeting set: Ms. Gwyneth Paltrow meeting with H.E. Al-Rumayyan
Attendees from PIF:
  - Governor of Public Investment Fund (yalrumayyan@pif.gov.sa)
Turqi A. Al-Nowaiser - Deputy Governor, and Head of International Investments Division (Talnowaiser@pif.gov.sa)
Yazeed A. Al-Humied - Deputy Governor, and Head of MENA Investments (yalhumied@pif.gov.sa)
Ghaliah AlShammari - Head of HE Business Development (galshammari@pif.gov.sa)
Attendees from Sanabil: 
  - CEO (a.abduljabbar@sanabil.com)
Attendees from your Respective Origination: 
Gwyneth Paltrow - Founder of Goop, Co-Founder of Kinship
Moj Mahdara - Co-Founder of Kinship
Abe Burns - Partner of Kinship
Jackson Eisenpresser - Founder of ABG and Partner of Kinship
 if you can give a summary of what happened in the meeting, please!
